[GH-73] Zeus - Orchestrator: GitHub Issue #73 ingested as GH-73 (Unable to move a request to specific folder). Status: TODO. Invoking Prometheus-Developer for implementation.
[PIPELINE] Prometheus - Developer: Starting implementation of [GH-73: Unable to move a request to specific folder].
[PIPELINE] Prometheus - Developer: Completed implementation of [GH-73: Unable to move a request to specific folder]. Status is now IMPLEMENTED. Changes: (1) src/components/sidebar/SidebarContextMenu.tsx — replaced the request "Move to" submenu: removed the `collections.length > 1` gate; added a recursive destination builder that collects all collection roots and all nested folders (excluding the current parent); renders them with depth-based indentation in a scrollable list so users can move requests to any folder or collection. (2) src/components/Sidebar.tsx — fixed handleDragEnd for request drags: added explicit folder/collection checks at the top of the `if (activeData && overData)` block so that dropping a request onto a folder item correctly moves it INTO that folder (previously `overData.folderId` was undefined for folder items, causing the move to land at the collection root instead); removed the unreachable dead-code `else if` branches. All 2217 tests pass.

All 2231 tests in 97 files (2217 pre-existing + 14 new).
